# Test schema generation with caller information

exec sourcereflect -pretty -type Config -caller config.go
cmp stdout expected.json

-- config.go --
package main

type Config struct {
	Host string `json:"host"`
	Port int    `json:"port"`
}

-- expected.json --
{
  "type": "object",
  "title": "Config",
  "properties": {
    "host": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "port": {
      "type": "integer"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "host",
    "port"
  ],
  "$sourceLocation": {
    "file": "config.go",
    "type": "Config"
  }
}
